reviews.comment:
Una estación de combustible amplia, atención regular a bien, y la comida que tienen disponible es aceptable, es de paso casi obligado, dado que no hay nada mas a muchos kilómetros a la redonda.....aceptan efectivo y tarjetas de crédito , los baños aceptables.

(Translated by Google)
A spacious gas station, service is average to good, and the food they have available is acceptable; it's almost a must-stop, given that there's nothing else for miles around... they accept cash and credit cards, and the restrooms are acceptable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwNXZPVlZREAE
